name: Bunn Community Park
description: Bunn Community Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Caldwell Park Tennis Center
description: Caldwell Park Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in United States, NC. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Crestview Park
description: Crestview Park is a place to play pickleball in United States, NC. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Moccasin Comfort Center
description: Moccasin Comfort Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Louisburg, NC. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: Oyster Harbour
description: Come play pickleball at Oyster Harbour in United States, NC! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are private.

description:

description: 4 dedicated Pickleball courts with climate controlled pavilion.

name: White Eagle Comfort Center
description: White Eagle Comfort Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Louisburg, NC. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Youngsville Parks & Rec
description: Come play pickleball at Youngsville Parks & Rec in Youngsville, NC! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Zoo City Sports Complex
description: Zoo City Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in United States, NC. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.
